title: mentha × eliae
intro: Mentha × eliae, also known as Elatior mint or Elatior peppermint, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mint family, resulting from the cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha requienii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × eliae include relief from headaches, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Mentha × eliae is often used in teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and relaxation.
